name: Whispers of the Verdant Grove
description: A tree often found near Silvermoon Hall. It has a unique appearance that makes it easily distinguishable from other trees.\n"When the wind begins to stir, anoint the Verdant Crest with the blessed mixture from the silver cup to honor the divinity."\nWhile whether the whispered wishes of the people can be heard remains unknown, the Verdant Crest, nourished by kuuvahki, is already flourishing with abundant life force...
